title: Chocolate bars pack
description: A simplistic texture pack inspired by chocolate bars and chocolate chunks.
body:
Chocolate bars pack is a simplistic texture pack inspired by chocolate bars and chocolate chunks.

It retains the core features of the game content, while eliminating any dazzling elements to provide a refreshing experience.

Based on the design and color scheme of the vanilla to ensure that the transition from the vanilla is not confusing or abrupt.

All textures, including blocks, items, creatures, interfaces, and particles, are comprehensively covered to ensure a complete textural experience.
